channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Rhythm horror game Wicked Delights announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

"Anime battles, sitcom coffee shop shenanigans, retro science-fiction adventures, and campy horror."

Beacon Pines developer Hiding Spot Games has announced Wicked Delights, a rhythm horror game featuring “anime battles, sitcom coffee shop shenanigans, retro science-fiction adventures, and campy horror.” It will be available for PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Hiding Spot Games:

The team behind Beacon Pines is working on a rhythm horror game!

It’s the early 2010s. Ander and her dad Marcel run a struggling video shop. To make matters worse, characters from an old re-used VHS tape are breaking out into their world. What unfolds is a frightening supernatural mystery that can only be solved through epic rhythm games.

Anime battles, sitcom coffee shop shenanigans, retro science-fiction adventures, and campy horror gore. Rhythm your way through them all and you might just save the world.

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/rhythm-horror-game-wicked-delights-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Penguin Colony ‘Story’ trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch 2

Something ancient waits beneath the ice.

Publisher Fellow Traveller and developer Origame Digital have released the official story trailer for Penguin Colony.

Here is an overview of the game, via Fellow Traveller:

Penguin Colony is the second game from ORIGAME DIGITAL, the developers of the acclaimed Umurangi Generation.

Part adaptation, part re-imagination, Penguin Colony is a sincere expansion of H.P. Lovecraft’s mythos. Drawing inspiration from stories like At the Mountains of Madness and The Shadow Out of Time, the game is set just two years after Lovecraft’s death, and carries on his tradition of weird fiction.

Set in the 1939, the game asks: “Who would his protagonists have been during that era?” It follows a titular colony of penguins observing the horrors uncovered by a group of Nazi scientists searching Antarctica for the architects of mankind.

Opposing them are the Indigenous Kaitiaki. One group seeks to extract this inconceivable power for its own destructive means, while the other, as it has been doing for generations, hopes to return it to its slumber for another hundred years.

These humans, with their strange sights and sounds, will pique the curiosity of the local penguins. Embody any one of these penguins and wander the frozen landscape, following the humans in their discoveries, and witnessing their minds collapse under the strain.

Penguin Colony is due out for PC via Steam in 2026, followed by Switch 2 shortly after.

Watch the trailer below.

Story Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/penguin-colony-story-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: The Mermaid Mask launches July 16 for PS5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Tangle Tower successor dated.

Tangle Tower successor The Mermaid Mask will launch for PlayStation 5, Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam on July 16, developer SFB Games announced. A demo is available now for PC.

Here is an overview of the game, via SFB Games:

In the pitch-black waters beyond the long-abandoned fishing town of Silkwirm-on-Sea, the enigmatic Captain Magnus Mortuga—rumored to be everything from an immortal time-traveler to a cursed vampire—has been found dead inside a locked room, marked by a single fatal wound with no weapon in sight. At the center of the chamber sits an ancient barnacle-covered cauldron, recently opened and eerily empty except for deep scratches within.

Summoned by the mysterious Captain Seafoam, players step into the shoes of Detective Grimoire and his sharp-tongued sidekick Sally to unravel a mystery that defies logic aboard the world’s strangest submarine. Building on the acclaimed formula of Tangle Tower, The Mermaid Mask combines layered puzzle-solving, eccentric fully voice-acted, hand-animated suspects, and satisfying detective work with SFB Games’ signature blend of dark themes and light-hearted British humor.

Returning to their roles are Edwyn Tiong as Detective Grimoire and Amber Lee Connors as Sally, joined by a cast of voice talent from games, anime, film, and radio, including Tara Langella (Hades II, The Outer Worlds 2), Steven Kearney (SimCity) Justine Leah Hince (Killer Kiss, UnOrdinary), Anairis Quinones (Re:Zero – Starting Life in Another World, Jujutsu Kaisen 0: The Movie), Eric Morgan Stuart (Life is Strange, Batman: Caped Crusader), Jacqui Bardelang (Metaphor: ReFantazio, Baldur’s Gate III), and Alex Bankier (Cat’s Eye, Code Geass: Dakkan no Z). The game also features stunning environments by Catherine Unger and a cinematic score by Raphael Benjamin Meyer, performed by the Budapest Art Orchestra.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/the-mermaid-mask-launches-july-16-for-ps5-switch-2-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Point-and-click adventure game Moomin: Midsummer Madness announced for Switch 2, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Due out in 2026.

Publisher Shochiku Games and developer Crossbridge Game Studios have announced point-and-click adventure game Moomin: Midsummer Madness for Switch 2, Switch, and PC (Steam). It will launch in 2026.

Here is an overview of the game, via its Steam page:

About

Moomin: Midsummer Madness is a delightfully playful point-and-click adventure inspired by Tove Jansson’s cherished Nordic fantasy novel, Moominsummer Madness. Play as Moomintroll and Little My as they explore a curious old theatre caught in a great flood. The journey will be filled with endearing encounters, familiar faces, and a touch of mischief.

A Hand-Painted Moomintale

Lovingly crafted against richly illustrated backdrops inspired by Tove Jansson’s original artistry, Moomin: Midsummer Madness‘s story unfolds across chapters filled with charming details for Moomin fans with a keen eye.

An Adventure for All Ages

Light puzzles and fun mini-games infuse each chapter with whimsy and small victories. Don’t worry! The hint system will make sure each challenge is relaxing and approachable.

  • ❮
  • ❯

An Uplifting Fable

To find their way home, the Moomins need to rely on kinship and open hearts, not to mention a little theatrical magic. Above all, Moomin: Midsummer Madness is a tale of curiosity, sympathy, and the small wonders around us.

Key Features

  • Point-and-click adventure starring Moomintroll and Little My.
  • Beautiful hand-painted world inspired by Tove Jansson’s Moominsummer Madness.
  • Rich music soundtrack lovingly composed for this game.
  • Relaxing, cozy gameplay designed for all ages.
  • Variety of beginner-friendly puzzles and charming mini-games.
  • Accessible built-in hint system.
  • Nordic storytelling brought to life by memorable characters and scenes.

Moomin: Midsummer Madness is equally enjoyable for longtime fans of the Moomins or fairy tale lovers about to set foot for the first time in their wondrous valley.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/point-and-click-adventure-game-moomin-midsummer-madness-announced-for-switch-2-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Go-Go Town! launches July 16 for Switch 2, Switch, and PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Switch
  • Switch 2

Currently in Early Access for PC.

Town-building simulation game Go-Go Town! will leave Early Access launch for Switch 2, Switch, and PC via Steam on July 16, publisher CULT Games and developer Prideful Sloth announced. The Switch 2 version is newly announced.

Go-Go Town! first launched in Early Access for PC via Steam on June 18, 2024.

PlayStation and Xbox versions are also planned.

Here is an overview of the game, via CULT Games:

Step into the role of a hands-on mayor and build your town from the ground up. Plan neighborhoods, automate logistics, and grow your community—all while juggling workers, infrastructure, and day-to-day chaos to create your dream town. Play solo for total control, or bring friends for co-op mayhem.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/go-go-town-launches-july-16-for-switch-2-switch-and-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Dragon Shelter launches September 24
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Become a hero in this farming sim set in a fantasy world.

Fantasy farming adventure game Dragon Shelter will launch for PC via Steam on September 24, publisher Curve Games and developer Wild Forest Studio announced.

“Developing Dragon Shelter, the goal has always been to create a world for players to escape to, a world where dragons and magic can thrive!,” said Wild Forest Studio game director Oleg Babenkov in a press release. “We are incredibly excited to invite players into this magical world from September 24, and we hope they enjoy the sneak peek on offer in the Steam demo in the meantime.”

Curve Games vice president of publishing Rich Keen added, “We are thrilled to help the incredible team at Wild Forest Studio bring their dream to life later this year. Dragon Shelter perfectly captures the heartfelt cozy experience players love, blending relaxing gameplay with whimsical creatures, and sprinkling in some cooking and gardening for good measure.”

Here is an overview of the game, via Wild Forest Studio:

About

Join a heartfelt adventure where friendship, care, and hard work restore harmony to a forgotten world. Rebuild the lost bond between humans and dragons as you transform abandoned lands into a place filled with warmth and joy. Grow crops, gather resources, raise adorable dragons, and help townsfolk rediscover their happiness.

Key Features

  • Adopt Unique Dragons – Befriend cheerful dragons, each with unique traits and special powers that assist you on the farm and beyond. Care for them with love and playtime, and they’ll become loyal companions who sense people’s needs and lend their magic wherever it’s needed.
  • Restore the Farm – Rebuild your grandpa’s abandoned farm into a thriving sanctuary. Grow crops, harvest resources, and craft valuable goods while your dragon helpers support every step. Watch the land come back to life as your care turns a forgotten place into a haven of joy.
  • Cook Delicious Dishes – Cooking is the heart of crafting in Dragon Shelter. Meals strengthen bonds with neighbors, lift spirits, and unlock new opportunities. Every harvest can be used in cooking, crafting, alchemy, or trade—making each recipe meaningful and rewarding.
  • Cheer Up the Townsfolk – A nearby town has fallen into gloom, but hope remains. With the help of your dragons, reconnect with the townsfolk, uncover their stories, and rekindle their sense of joy and community.
  • Explore a World of Wonder – Venture into a vibrant fantasy world filled with magical biomes, curious creatures, and hidden secrets. Every journey offers delightful surprises and the chance to restore life to forgotten lands.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/dragon-shelter-launches-september-24
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Croakwood launches in Early Access this winter
item.content:encoded:
• PC

A cozy town builder about frogs and nature.

Town building simulation game Croakwood will launch in Early Access for PC via Steam this winter, developer Texel Raptor announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Texel Raptor:

About

Croakwood is a creative, relaxed town building simulation game about frogs and nature! Design and create structures, plan and decorate towns, and explore an ancient forest to guide the growth of a charming community of tiny amphibians as they settle into their new life in the lush and wild woods.

Nestled in the heart of Croakwood Forest is a community unlike any other! It’s your job to guide your froggy villagers in the right direction so their village thrives. Build all sorts of community structures, from houses to shops, implement production chains and other jobs, and sit back and watch as the villagers pitch in self-sufficiently to build their home in Croakwood Forest.

The best part? Croakwood is perfect for those who want to unwind and have a chill town building experience, no time pressure or conflicts involved. The main goal is happiness: for both you and your froggy friends!

Key Features

  • Build the Perfect Frog Town – Design and customize homes inside and out with a flexible, piece-based building system.
  • A Village That Lives on Its Own – Watch frogs gather, craft, and transport resources as they go about their daily routines.
  • From Pond to Production – Set up production chains and other jobs. Guide your town’s economy as villagers collect and process materials by hand.
  • Happy Frogs, Thriving Town – Fulfill requests and meet your villagers’ needs to unlock new content and grow your community.
  • Expand Through the Forest – Unlock new areas, discover secrets, and grow your town deeper into the Croakwood.
  • Play at Your Own Pace – Optimize every detail or sit back and enjoy a cozy, low-pressure experience.

Watch a new trailer below.

Early Access Release Window Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/croakwood-launches-in-early-access-this-winter
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Is This Seat Taken? coming to PS5 in August
item.content:encoded:
• PS5

Currently available for Switch, PC, iOS, and Android.

Publisher Wholesome Games Presents and developer Poti Poti Studio will release puzzle game Is This Seat Taken? for PlayStation 5 in August, the companies announced.

Is This Seat Taken? first launched Switch via Nintendo eShop, PC via Steam, iOS via App Store, and Android via Google Play on August 7, 2025.

Here is an overview of the game, via Wholesome Games Presents:

About

Whether it’s the cinema, a crowded bus, a wedding reception, or a cramped taxi cab, every setting introduces new characters with specific tastes. A party guest with a sensitive nose won’t be happy sitting next to a stranger who’s wearing too much cologne. A sleepy passenger won’t be happy trying to nap on the bus next to someone listening to loud music. It’s all about reading the room to find the perfect placement!

Nat is an aspiring actor whose world gets turned upside down when they see a shape just like them on the big screen. This discovery sends Nat on a global journey to meet their hero and figure out how to fit in. Experience Nat’s heartfelt story as you travel from city to city, each with its own levels, characters, and charm.

Key Features

  • Play seating matchmaker to please picky characters.
  • Discover each character’s unique traits—relatable, outlandish, and everything in between.
  • Piece together satisfying puzzles with no timers or leaderboards.
  • Unlock fun new scenarios as you progress—from bus rides to banquets!

Watch the launch trailer below.

PlayStation 5 Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/is-this-seat-taken-coming-to-ps5-in-august
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Discounty ‘People or Profit?’ update announced
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Switch
  • Xbox Series

Available now for PC, in July for consoles.

Publisher PQube and developer Crinkle Cut Games have announced the free update “People or Profit?” for supermarket life simulation game Discounty. It is available now for PC, with a release on PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and Switch planned for July.

Here is an overview of the update, via PQube:

About the Update

The “People or Profit?” expansion takes place directly after the original ending of Discounty. In the brand-new chapter, Aunt Tellar finally puts players in charge, leaving them responsible for deciding the fate of Discounty… and Blomkest. Depending on the decisions players make through the branching final questline, and the people they decide to align with, they will see one of three new endings to the game. Throughout the chapter, players will cross paths with three eccentric new characters; Gaspard, Tammy’s disgraced brother who dreams of running a hydroponic farm; Angeel, a bougie city girl opening a branch of the luxury grocery store Muimerp; and Casey, a “troubled” teen attempting to sell players “legitimate” goods from the trunk of their car.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Key Features

  • Town Restoration – Take on renovations big and small to restore Blomkest to its former glory! Help Solruna get back her old shop, reopen the long-neglected John Key museum, pry open the mysterious old shed…or erect Discounty billboards all over town.
  • Shop Gadgets – Players can discover Jürgen’s old workshop to create advanced gadgets that bring their shop into the modern age. From a self-checkout register to an online order fulfilment system, there are plenty of new options to enhance the store.
  • Choose Your Items – Players can now select which items they want to stock in their shop and, with the inclusion of 35 new items, there are plenty of options to choose from.
  • Shop Events – Random events will force players to shift their tactics, making no two shop days the same.
  • Buy a House – Move out of Aunt Tellar’s old trailer and into a bigger, permanent house.

The latest free update to Discounty also introduces a wealth of smaller features, improvements, quality of life updates and bug fixes, making the return to Blomkest smoother and even more enjoyable.

Discounty is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, Switch, and PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and GOG.

Watch a new trailer below.

“People or Profit?” Update Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/discounty-people-or-profit-update-announced
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Diorama crafting game Book Nook announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

"A quiet meditation on the joy of craft."

Publisher WINGS and developer Malapata Studio have announced Book Nook, a diorama crafting game coming to PC via Steam. A release date was not announced.

“We wanted to create something small in scope but with a strong emotional impact,” said studio director Anabel Sanchez in a press release. “We drew inspiration from our favorite book nooks—those we’ve spent countless hours enjoying without even noticing the time pass—and wanted to make an intimate game that pays tribute to them.”

Here is an overview of the game, via WINGS:

Book Nook is a satisfying game with puzzle elements that celebrates the experience of creating something with your own hands. Piece by piece, Book Nook invites you to build small corners filled with life—placing furniture, decorations, and tiny details until everything fits perfectly. You’ll be carried along by the calm of creation, discovering how each diorama transports you to a special memory.

What makes this game particularly special is that every Book Nook has a story to tell, through which we meet Dario and Elora. Their story is told from childhood to old age, exploring love, family, and the people who are always there to hold our hand.

  • ❮
  • ❯

Following Camper Van: Make it Home, Malapata Studio continues its commitment to carefully crafted aesthetics and relaxing experiences. This time, the studio incorporates puzzle elements that make the assembly process the heart of the game.

Once again, Book Nook is supported by Wings Fund Me, an investment fund specializing in supporting women-led game studios, which previously partnered with Malapata Studio on Camper Van: Make it Home. Their continued support allows the team to keep developing projects with their own creative vision.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Teaser Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/diorama-crafting-game-book-nook-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Son of Thanjai ‘Gameplay Reveal’ trailer
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • PS5
  • Xbox Series

Action adventure game set in ancient South India.

Ayelet Studio has released the gameplay reveal trailer for Son of Thanjai, an action adventure game set in 11th century South India.

Here is an overview of the game, via Ayelet Studio:

About

Son of Thanjai is a cinematic action adventure epic set in the culturally rich 11th century South India. As a Chola king burdened by legacy, you must embark on a personal journey that blurs the line between duty and destiny. Will you rise as a legend—or be forgotten?

Thanjavur is no longer the empire you left behind. Whispers of unrest echo through its temples and streets. Allies seem uncertain; enemies hide in plain sight; foreign saboteurs inch closer to your throne.

As a king born in the shadow of his father’s greatness, you must carve your own path while treading the fine line between duty and destiny.

Crush your enemies, protect your people, and immerse yourself in 11th century South India in this cinematic action-adventure epic.

Strike From the Shadows or Unleash Fury

Mount horses, elephants, and bulls—or blend into the crowd–as you hunt your targets through the vibrant city of Thanjai and its outskirts.

  • Master the Surulvaal, a deadly whip-sword, where every swing is a spectacle and every strike is personal
  • Engage in fluid, high-stakes melee combat inspired by Kalarippayattu, an ancient martial art
  • Chain attacks and drop visceral finishers with elegance
  • Disarm enemies with a variety of period-inspired weapons
  • Infiltrate enemy camps and interrogate key targets to unlock crucial intel

You control the battlefield.

Relive the Epic Culture of 11th Century Southern India

The world of Thanjai is a meticulously researched, richly detailed recreation of the Chola empire at its height, alive with culture, music, and meaning.

  • Wander through the streets of Thanjavur, where temples pierce the sky and walls whisper forgotten stories.
  • Witness folk performances, classical dances, and ceremonies drawn from ancient Tamil customs.
  • Interact with everyday people–priests, farmers, merchants, and fishermen–each responding differently depending on how you present yourself
  • Discover hidden lore that reflects your past and challenges your beliefs.

Your Legacy Is Waiting to Be Written

You are more than your bloodline. Stand tall. Defend your people.

Your empire awaits.

Son of Thanjai is in development for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, and PC via Steam. A release date has yet to be announced.

Watch the trailer below.

Gameplay Reveal Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/son-of-thanjai-gameplay-reveal-trailer
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Montabi adds Xbox Series and Xbox One versions, launches August 6
item.content:encoded:
• PC
  • Xbox One
  • Xbox Series

Creature collector roguelike deckbuilder dated.

Creature collector roguelike deckbuilder Montabi will launch for PC via Steam, Epic Games Store, and GOG on August 6, publisher Akupara Games and developer Mankibo announced. The Xbox Series version is newly announced. A PC demo is currently available, with an updated demo due out on June 15 for Steam Next Fest: June 2026 Edition.

Here is an overview of the game, via Akupara Games:

About

On a quest to save the city, you’ll tame a roster of unique Montabi, each with their own abilities, in order to battle your way through unforgiving streets. You’ll strategize on a tactical three-by-three battlemap, evolve your Montabi into more powerful forms, and unlock new cards that keep your options fresh—no run ever plays the same way.

Key Features

  • Build Your Deck By Taming – If you’re going to be the big hero and save the city, you’ve gotta get some Montabi! Each Montabi has a unique set of skills, giving you endless combinations for team synergies. Collect equipment and charms and utilize them to chart the path to victory!
  • Evolve, Learn New Skills – Train your Montabi to grow stronger, unlocking new moves to enhance your team’s strategy. As they level up, your Montabi evolve into more powerful forms, gaining new card abilities and expanding your tactical options. If you work together, there’s nothing you and your Montabi can’t achieve!
  • Outsmart Your Opponents – Deploy your best strategies to beat up the bad guys in a unique 3×3 grid-based system. With every Montabi’s unique abilities, you’ll have endless options to outthink the competition and win the day. Just make sure you rest up at a cafe every now and then to recover those hit points!
  • Choose Your Trainer – Select from diverse trainers, each with a unique playstyle. Do you wanna put your team in the perfect position, get right up in their faces and duke it out, or buff up your Montabi with a hearty meal? When the city’s at stake, everyone pitches in! Just make sure to stay safe! Like the king in chess, if your trainer is defeated, the game ends.
  • Try Every Montabi – Choose your favorite of the 22 starters and start battling! Since each evolutionary line has a unique deck, your playstyle options are endless. With over 500 cards to choose from, every run is unique!

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/montabi-adds-xbox-series-and-xbox-one-versions-launches-august-6
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: NO STRAIGHT ROADS 2 – Southeast Asian Games Showcase: Summer Game Fest 2026 Edition trailer, screenshots
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Meet Vanessa Lyte and Rama Irama.

Publisher Shueisha Games and developer Metronomik have released a new trailer and screenshots for NO STRAIGHT ROADS 2 as part of Southeast Asian Games Showcase: Summer Game Fest 2026 Edition.

Here are the latest details:

The trailer puts the spotlight on Vanessa Lyte and her show, Vanessa’s Hi-Lytes, as she broadcasts the chaos surrounding the broken Grand Qwasa. With its fragments scattered across the Peninsula, Mayday, Zuke, and Casey are sent on a new road trip to recover them.

The trailer also confirms the return of fan-favorite characters DJ Subatomic Supernova and Tatiana, while introducing new rivals including Vanessa Lyte and Rama Irama.

And then… Sayu 2.0?

Alongside the trailer, Metronomik has released new screenshots featuring Mayday, Zuke, Casey, Vanessa Lyte and Tatiana, giving fans a fresh look at the colorful world, updated characters, and high-energy musical battles of No Straight Roads 2.

NO STRAIGHT ROADS 2 is due out for unspecified consoles and PC via Steam in 2026.

Watch the trailer below. View the screenshots at the gallery.

Southeast Asian Games Showcase: Summer Game Fest 2026 Edition Trailer

Screenshots

  • ❮
  • ❯


https://www.gematsu.com/2026/06/no-straight-roads-2-southeast-asian-games-showcase-summer-game-fest-2026-edition-trailer-screenshots
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
